Wind Direction and Speed Graphs

Elise Lissick

2026-04-21

library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
# install.packages("svglite", repos = "https://cloud.r-project.org")
library(svglite)

# read combined summary file
df <- read_csv("all_direction_summary.csv", show_col_types = FALSE)
df <- df %>%
  filter(!is.na(farm), !grepl("^==>", farm))

head(df)
## # A tibble: 6 × 7
##   farm      asset_id source_file   season direction_sector     n   prop
##   <chr>        <dbl> <chr>         <chr>  <chr>            <dbl>  <dbl>
## 1 WindFarmA        0 0_cleaned.csv Fall   E                 4997 0.384 
## 2 WindFarmA        0 0_cleaned.csv Fall   N                  544 0.0418
## 3 WindFarmA        0 0_cleaned.csv Fall   NE                 550 0.0422
## 4 WindFarmA        0 0_cleaned.csv Fall   NW                1311 0.101 
## 5 WindFarmA        0 0_cleaned.csv Fall   S                 1135 0.0871
## 6 WindFarmA        0 0_cleaned.csv Fall   SE                1594 0.122
# combine turbine-level summaries into farm-level summaries
heatmap_df <- df %>%
  group_by(farm, season, direction_sector) %>%
  summarise(n = sum(n), .groups = "drop") %>%
  group_by(farm, season) %>%
  mutate(prop = n / sum(n)) %>%
  ungroup()

# order seasons and compass directions
heatmap_df$season <- factor(
  heatmap_df$season,
  levels = c("Spring", "Summer", "Fall", "Winter")
)

heatmap_df$direction_sector <- factor(
  heatmap_df$direction_sector,
  levels = c("N", "NE", "E", "SE", "S", "SW", "W", "NW")
)

heatmap_df
## # A tibble: 64 × 5
##    farm      season direction_sector     n   prop
##    <chr>     <fct>  <fct>            <dbl>  <dbl>
##  1 WindFarmA Fall   E                99197 0.347 
##  2 WindFarmA Fall   N                14207 0.0497
##  3 WindFarmA Fall   NE               10326 0.0361
##  4 WindFarmA Fall   NW               28255 0.0989
##  5 WindFarmA Fall   S                23580 0.0825
##  6 WindFarmA Fall   SE               47186 0.165 
##  7 WindFarmA Fall   SW               27171 0.0951
##  8 WindFarmA Fall   W                35865 0.125 
##  9 WindFarmA Spring E                85134 0.293 
## 10 WindFarmA Spring N                16366 0.0563
## # ℹ 54 more rows
heatmap_plot <- ggplot(heatmap_df, aes(x = season, y = direction_sector, fill = prop)) +
  geom_tile(color = "white") +
  geom_text(aes(label = sprintf("%.2f", prop)), size = 3) +
  facet_wrap(~ farm) +
  labs(
    title = "Seasonal Wind Direction Distribution by Wind Farm",
    x = "Season",
    y = "Direction Sector",
    fill = "Proportion"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  scale_fill_gradientn(
  colours = c("#E8F4C8",
              "#C7E6F4",
              "#F4C7D9")
)

heatmap_plot

# remember that for wind farm b, we excluded two line with avg wind speed = about 140 (which is impossible)
anom <- read_csv("all_anomaly_summary.csv", show_col_types = FALSE)

head(anom)
## # A tibble: 6 × 5
##   farm      direction_sector wind_speed_bin anomaly_indicator     n
##   <chr>     <chr>            <chr>                      <dbl> <dbl>
## 1 WindFarmA E                0-2                            0 11812
## 2 WindFarmA E                0-2                            1  1669
## 3 WindFarmA E                12+                            0 55700
## 4 WindFarmA E                12+                            1 12356
## 5 WindFarmA E                2-4                            0 37554
## 6 WindFarmA E                2-4                            1  4664

Plot 2: Anomaly rate by direction sector (A and B only)

direction_plot <- anom %>%
  filter(farm != "WindFarmC") %>%
  group_by(farm, direction_sector) %>%
  summarise(
    anomaly_rate = sum(n[anomaly_indicator == 1]) / sum(n),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

direction_plot$direction_sector <- factor(
  direction_plot$direction_sector,
  levels = c("N","NE","E","SE","S","SW","W","NW")
)

direction_anomaly_plot <- ggplot(direction_plot,
       aes(x = direction_sector,
           y = anomaly_rate,
           fill = farm)) +
  geom_col(position = "dodge") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(
    "WindFarmA" = "#E8F4C8",
    "WindFarmB" = "#F7D9C4"
  )) +
  labs(
    title = "Anomaly Rate by Wind Direction Sector",
    x = "Direction Sector",
    y = "Anomaly Rate"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

direction_anomaly_plot

Plot 3: Anomaly rate by wind speed

speed_plot <- anom %>%
  group_by(farm, wind_speed_bin) %>%
  summarise(
    anomaly_rate = sum(n[anomaly_indicator == 1]) / sum(n),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

speed_plot$wind_speed_bin <- factor(
  speed_plot$wind_speed_bin,
  levels = c("0-2","2-4","4-6","6-8","8-12","12+")
)

speed_anomaly_plot <- ggplot(speed_plot,
       aes(x = wind_speed_bin,
           y = anomaly_rate,
           color = farm,
           group = farm)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.3) +
  geom_point(size = 5) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c(
    "WindFarmA" = "#E8F4C8",
    "WindFarmB" = "#F7D9C4",
    "WindFarmC" = "#C7E6F4"
  )) +
  labs(
    title = "Anomaly Rate by Wind Speed",
    x = "Wind Speed (m/s)",
    y = "Anomaly Rate"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

speed_anomaly_plot

# count of observations by each farm with wind speed in 0-2
count_plot <- anom %>%
  filter(wind_speed_bin=="0-2") %>%
  group_by(farm) %>%
  summarise(
    total = sum(n),
    .groups = "drop"
  )
count_plot
## # A tibble: 3 × 2
##   farm       total
##   <chr>      <dbl>
## 1 WindFarmA 106291
## 2 WindFarmB  30523
## 3 WindFarmC   5124
ggsave("heatmap_plot.svg",
       plot = heatmap_plot,
       width = 10,
       height = 6)

ggsave("direction_anomaly_plot.svg",
       plot = direction_anomaly_plot,
       width = 8,
       height = 5)

ggsave("speed_anomaly_plot.svg",
       plot = speed_anomaly_plot,
       width = 8,
       height = 5)
